rationale: Educ. Code §29.085 governs a life skills program for student parents funded by state appropriations. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions or property tax values, so the proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change creates no direct conflict.
quote: From funds appropriated for the purpose, the commissioner shall distribute funds for programs under this section.
_note: No direct linkage between this statute and Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Indirect school-finance revenue effects are outside this rule's operative text.
